arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho contract clause sees Chelsea put Man Utd in very difficult position
arts.sum: Sancho has made 10 appearances for Maresca's Chelsea this season, contributing two goals and five assists, helping the Blues climb to second place in the Premier League. With Chelsea currently in second and 12 points ahead of 13th-placed United, it appears increasingly likely that Amorim won't get the opportunity to work with the winger.
